title: Llama Family LLM Model Spec
description: Model specification for Llama-family instruct models. Uses header_id chat template.
documentation:
## Purpose
Tags a model spec as belonging to the Llama model family, enabling the runtime to apply the `<|header_id|>` / `<|eot_id|>` chat template used by Llama 3 and compatible models.

## When to use
This tag is added automatically during content inspection. Use it in cap selectors when you want to explicitly target Llama-family instruct models regardless of backend.

## Notes
Llama-family GGUF models resolve to `media:gguf;llama;llm;model-spec;textable` after full resolution. Llama 2 and Llama 3 use different template syntax; the runtime should detect the exact variant from the model's embedded chat template.
